name: Green Brick Partners, Inc.
summary: Green Brick Partners, Inc. is a diversified homebuilding and land development company operating through seven builder brands in Dallas-Fort Worth, Austin, Houston, Atlanta, and Treasure Coast, Florida. The company acquires and develops land, builds single-family homes, townhomes, condos, luxury homes, and patio homes, and provides title, mortgage, and insurance agency services. As of December 31, 2025, it owned or had under contract approximately 48,900 home sites.
